'''Nebin Cray''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who governed the [[Trans-Nebular sector/Legends|Trans-Nebular sector]] and the planet [[Goroth Prime/Legends|Goroth Prime]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Cray was made Moff of the sector after [[Moff (Trans-Nebular sector)|his predecessor]] and his government co-conspirators had been [[Death/Legends|executed]] for [[Treason/Legends|treason]]. It was Cray who developed the plans for mining Goroth Prime, after re-discovering the planet in old documents. He was later replaced by Moff [[Gal Brello]].

{{Char-stub}}
